lastReleaseMessage: Doc and config follow-up to the v0.14.4 hardening pass. DESIGN.md api sections now describe the shipped behavior: rules validation and real change counts, preview LIKE escaping, transactions_live read paths, clamped analytics params, guardCents on budgets, single-query stats with archived count. Dependabot now ignores react-family major bumps so react and react-dom can only move as a pair, closing the mismatch that PR 7 introduced.

barRaise.topFinding: Carry-forward pass. Only one commit landed since the 2026-07-04 full pass: v0.14.5 (e334403), a doc-and-config follow-up that synced the DESIGN.md api sections to shipped behavior and made Dependabot pair react and react-dom so a future major bump cannot desync them the way PR 7 did. No runtime code changed, so a fresh 28-lens fan-out would re-derive the same finding set; this run re-verified the four open MED actions and the four hard rules directly against HEAD instead. All four hard rules still hold (D-006 loopback bind at server.ts:1256 with server-bind.test.ts, D-001 no outbound from importers/, D-003 guardCents at boundaries, D-004/D-007 BackupFailedError + backup_failed), every version pill reads 0.14.5, and no lens returned a BLOCK. Health holds at 89 (working). The four MED actions carry forward unchanged: bulk-delete still deletes rows with no pre-delete snapshot (server.ts:534), push-to-github.ps1 still blind-deletes .git/index.lock before its Assert-GitSafe (lines 28-31), the yesandeverything.com CORS grant is still on the wildcard /* (server.ts:91-96), and the fifth Discord webhook file (.discord_resources_webhook.txt) still does not exist. The security<->solo-tool-ux tension is now at runsSeen 5; it is an undecided decision, not a daily tradeoff, and should be promoted via adr-promoter into docs/DECISIONS.md.

actions.title: Delete the blind Remove-Item .git\index.lock block in push-to-github.ps1:28-31 and rely on Assert-GitSafe.
Narrow the yesandeverything.com CORS grant (server.ts:91-96) off the wildcard /* to the GET probe route only.
Reconcile the Budget audit/resources Discord webhook wiring against the naming standard (fifth webhook file missing).
